response_text:
# Git Branching Strategies: GitFlow vs Trunk-Based Development

## The Core Philosophy Difference

```
GitFlow: Multiple long-lived branches, structured releases
Trunk-Based: Everyone integrates to one branch frequently
```

---

## GitFlow

### Branch Structure
```
main (production)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ develop (integration)
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ feature/user-auth
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ feature/payment-system
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ feature/notifications
в”ңв”Җв”Җ release/1.2.0
в”ңв”Җв”Җ hotfix/critical-bug
в””в”Җв”Җ (tags: v1.0.0, v1.1.0, v1.2.0)
```

### Branch Roles
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ Branch      в”Ӯ Purpose                                  в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ main        в”Ӯ Production-ready code only               в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ develop     в”Ӯ Integration branch for features          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ feature/*   в”Ӯ Individual features (from develop)       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ release/*   в”Ӯ Release prep, bug fixes only             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ hotfix/*    в”Ӯ Emergency production fixes               в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### Typical GitFlow Lifecycle
```bash
# 1. Start a feature
git checkout develop
git checkout -b feature/user-authentication

# 2. Work on feature
git add .
git commit -m "Add login endpoint"
git commit -m "Add JWT token handling"
git commit -m "Add session management"

# 3. Merge feature back to develop
git checkout develop
git merge --no-ff feature/user-authentication
git branch -d feature/user-authentication

# 4. Create release branch
git checkout -b release/1.2.0

# 5. Release prep (version bumps, minor fixes only)
git commit -m "Bump version to 1.2.0"
git commit -m "Fix release notes typo"

# 6. Finish release - merge to BOTH main and develop
git checkout main
git
